problem id: 892d73b5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  00000100 -> 10000000
  01110010 -> 01001110
  00011111 -> 11100011
  01100011 -> 01101100
  01001001 -> 00101001
  10110111 -> 11110110
  01110001 -> 00101110
  10111101 -> 10110111
  10100101 -> 10110100

query: 10101000
predicted answer: 00010101
